hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) uv run --project "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/MNIST-PyTorch" ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; uv run --project "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/MNIST-PyTorch" pyright "$f";; esac; true
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.c|*.h|*.cc|*.cpp|*.hpp|*.cxx|*.hxx|*.cu|*.cuh) clang-format -i "$f";; esac; true

d="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/MNIST-CUDA"; [ -f "$d/Makefile" ] || exit 0; make -C "$d" apple -q >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; out=$(make -C "$d" apple 2>&1) || { echo "Local C++ build is broken (make apple failed):" >&2; printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -n 30 >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0
